mapper.select: SELECT CTNT_NO AS ctntNo, SUM(VIEW_CNT) AS viewCnt FROM view_log WHERE VIEW_DT = #{date} GROUP BY CTNT_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO view_stats_daily (STAT_DT, CTNT_NO, VIEW_CNT) VALUES (#{date}, #{ctntNo}, #{viewCnt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE VIEW_CNT = VALUES(VIEW_CNT), UPD_DTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
INSERT INTO view_stats_daily (STAT_DT, CTNT_NO, VIEW_CNT) VALUES (#{date}, #{ctntNo}, #{viewCnt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE VIEW_CNT = VALUES(VIEW_CNT), UPD_DTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
INSERT INTO content_stats (CTNT_NO, VIEW_CNT) VALUES (#{ctntNo}, #{viewCnt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE VIEW_CNT = VIEW_CNT + VALUES(VIEW_CNT), UPD_DTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
